questions.question: What is Leqembi, which is in news recently?
questions.explanation: The United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has approved Leqembi (lecanemab-irmb) which is a medication designed to treat Alzheimer’s disease. However, this decision raises difficult issues concerning the safety and affordability of the drug.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry published the report of ‘Performance Grading Index for Districts (PGI-D)’?
questions.explanation: Recently, the Ministry of Education’s Department of School Education and Literacy (DoSE&L) has published the combined report of the Performance Grading Index for Districts (PGI-D) for the years 2020-21 and 2021-22. This report evaluates the performance of the school education system at the District level by establishing an index for thorough analysis. It graded 742 districts during 2020-21 and 748 districts during 2021-22 across India.

questions.question: Which institution released the report titled ‘Twenty Years of Child Trafficking Data’?
questions.explanation: The International Organization for Migration (IOM) and the François-Xavier Bagnoud Center for Health and Human Rights at Harvard University collaborated on a report titled ‘From Evidence to Action: Twenty Years of IOM Child Trafficking Data to Inform Policy and Programming.’ According to this report, more than 50% of child trafficking victims are subjected to trafficking within their own countries.

questions.question: Which city hosted the Laser National Championship?
questions.explanation: The 37th Hyderabad Sailing Week -2023 and Laser National Championship concluded on a grand note at Secunderabad Sailing Club. The EME Sailing Association, the Laser Class Association of India (LCAI) and Secunderabad Sailing Club organized the event.

questions.question: Which state/UT launched the upgraded version of Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana-Mukhyamantri Amrutam (PMJAY-MA) scheme?
questions.explanation: Recently, the Gujarat Government introduced an upgraded version of the Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana-Mukhyamantri Amrutam (PMJAY-MA) scheme. It allows individuals to access free medical treatment of up to Rs 10 lakh, an increase from the previous limit of Rs 5 lakh. A total of 2,027 government hospitals, 803 private hospitals, and 18 Central government hospitals in the state are authorized to offer medical treatment and perform surgeries.

questions.question: Which country hosted the ‘India-Arab business partnership conference’ recently?
questions.explanation: The sixth India-Arab Partnership Conference 2023 was organized in New Delhi. UAE was the third-largest trading partner of India while Saudi Arabia, was the fourth-largest partner during the last financial year. The Conference has provided a useful platform to the business community on both sides to explore new prospects for trade and investment.

questions.question: As per a recent draft notice, Installation of air-conditioning systems has been mandated in the cabins of trucks manufactured from which date?
questions.explanation: Recently, the Indian government released a draft notice that requires the installation of air-conditioning systems in truck cabins, manufactured from 1st January 2025 onwards. This step aims to enhance the working environment for truck drivers in India. The Ministry of Road Transport and Highways said installation of air-conditioning system in the cabins of motor vehicles belonging to categories N2 and N3 will be mandatory. The N2 category motor vehicles are goods carriages of 3.5 tons, while N3 exceed 12 tons.

questions.question: Which country launched methane and liquid oxygen-powered rocket, Zhuque-2?
questions.explanation: Chinese aerospace company LandSpace recently launched methane and liquid oxygen-powered rocket, Zhuque-2, from the Jiuquan Satellite Launch Centre. The successful mission involved placing a test payload into the sun-synchronous orbit (SSO), making LandSpace the first company globally to accomplish this achievement.

questions.question: ‘Prayut Chan-o-cha’, who was seen in the news, was the Prime Minister of which country?
questions.explanation: Thailand’s Prime Minister, Prayut Chan-o-cha, has made an announcement of his departure from the political arena. After assuming power in a coup as the army chief in 2014, he has held Thailand’s highest position and governed the country since then.

questions.question: James Webb Space Telescope is associated with which space agency?
questions.explanation: NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope completes its first year of science on July 12. The space agency will commemorate this anniversary by releasing a new science image in a live stream.NASA unveiled a brand-new Webb science image on July 12, showcasing the birth of a star in the Rho Ophiuchi cloud complex.
